name: Totaligent, Inc.
summary: Totaligent, Inc. (Totaligent or the Company) is a technology company, with its headquarters located in Boca Raton, Florida, that provides person-based digital marketing for companies and individuals to use and unlock owned and acquired data to efficiently market their products, services, and brands. Totaligent launched a public beta version of its integrated digital marketing platform in the first quarter of 2025 that democratizes the use of first-, second-, and third-party data.
